text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 364 

PRE_ICL_LTCP_COINS_G_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply of generic drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of generic drugs 
on this tier, using long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of 
the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG
